accepted_findings: server startup path is fast and does not emit output before handshake
raw probe and official SDK client both receive no initialize response
official SDK server stdio pattern matches a hanging control experiment on this host
current custom stdio workaround also depends on an async or threaded stdin read that hangs under the same host conditions
notes: sdk_stdio_init_hang_class is a visible symptom but not the best sole root-cause label because the custom async workaround hangs too
a fully synchronous stdio bridge was not implemented in this investigation
